posts.author: MintyGarden74
posts.text: URGENT: Need to update my payment details ASAP! Please reply with your password and 2FA code to unlock your account. Click here [link removed] to send them securely.
posts.explanation: This is a clear credential-harvesting scam asking for passwords and security codes via a link, which requires immediate removal as a fraud violation.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
